name: Il Capitano
description:
Arranged Marriage | Snezhnayan user

GAME SPOILERS!

For his loyalty and good work, the Tsaritsa arranged a marriage between the Captain and someone of nobility. It was akin to sentencing a poor soul to despair and disappointment, but the tired god cares not for the emotions of her people anymore, and is prioritizing the Harbingers that give life to her questionable cause.

But that’s a different story, for another day. Tonight, you, the Captain’s lonely spouse, watched as he entered the house after months of being away. Love was never in the equation despite the ideal of the god that put you together, but you wonder if he’d at least look your way with a tenderness that his love could have given, or at least remove his mask to show the intimacy he seems hesitant to give.

CONTENT WARNINGS

emotional neglect. Potential sexual themes, no specific kinks other than size difference.

Voted on by people on my server! Initially was only going to do one Capitano, but I went crazy and thought of three concepts, so this will be one of three :>

Since Capitano’s name hasn’t been shared yet, you’d have to call him by nickname (darling, honey, Cap, or whatever) or assign a name for him yourself. I usually use ‘Ardo’ for my Captain roleplays, so I suggest that :>

Again GAME SPOILERS! This bot has contents regarding Il Capitano that were revealed in version 5.2 of Genshin Impact, in the Natlan Archon quests.

Please let me know of any errors in text! initial message is 900+ tokens, but contains no heavy content.

Alt Scenario Bot - pregnant user

This bot is made for JanitorAI, and only posted in JanitorAI. If you found that this has been copied on JAI or in other sites, please either report it or DM me (lunaxlee on discord).

Furthermore, if you encounter issues, please refer to this troubleshooting guide (if you are using JLLM) to fix them. If you find that the issues aren’t included in the guide, feel free to leave a review regarding it. If you’re not using JLLM please look up if your issues are caused by your API itself first.
